app

once created, only WhichBookingsToUpdate can be used to update the series. No
new bookings can be added to the series

administrator before confirmed or charged. Tentative bookings still block the
calendar

in a repeated series. This is the only field that can modify a series after
creation

options.description: Output JSON envelope with summary for AI agents

options.name: --allowed-tariffs
options.description:
IDs of pricing plans whose customers are allowed
to book when this rule applies to them. Only customers on one of these plans can
proceed.

options.name: --allowed-teams
options.description:
IDs of teams whose members are allowed to book
when this rule applies to them. Only members of one of these teams can
proceed.

options.name: --apply-rule-from
options.description:
Date from which this rule starts being evaluated.
Null means no start-date restriction.

options.name: --apply-rule-to
options.description:
Date after which this rule stops being evaluated.
Null means no end-date restriction.

options.name: --base-url
options.description: Override the Nexudus API base URL

options.name: --book-in-advance-limit
options.description:
Maximum number of days in advance a booking can be
made. Null means no limit.

options.name: --cancellation-fee-amount
options.description:
Fixed cancellation fee amount. Used when
CancellationFeeType is Absolute.

options.name: --cancellation-fee-percentage
options.description:
Cancellation fee as a percentage of the booking
cost. Used when CancellationFeeType is Percentage.

options.name: --cancellation-fee-product-id
options.description:
ID of the product used to invoice cancellation
fees when this rule applies.

options.name: --cancellation-fee-type
options.description:
How the cancellation fee is calculated: Absolute
(fixed amount) or Percentage (of booking cost).

options.name: --charge-cancellation-fee
options.description:
When true, a fee is charged for late cancellations
(past the LateCancellationLimit).

options.name: --courses
options.description:
IDs of courses this rule applies to. The rule only
fires for customers who have completed one of these courses.

options.name: --eligible-time-slots
options.description:
Time slots defining when this rule applies
(eligibility windows). The year, month and day component of FromTime/ToTime is
always 1976-01-01. (JSON array or @filepath)

options.name: --evaluation-order
options.description:
Order in which this rule is evaluated relative to
other rules on the same resource. Lower values are evaluated first.

options.name: --event-categories
options.description:
IDs of event categories this rule applies to. The
rule only fires for customers who have attended (checked in to) an event in one
of these categories.

options.name: --interval-limit
options.description:
Minimum interval (in minutes) between consecutive
bookings on this resource, used as a buffer for setup or cleaning.

options.name: --late-booking-limit
options.description:
Minimum lead time (in minutes) required before a
booking can start. Prevents last-minute bookings.

options.name: --late-cancellation-limit
options.description:
Cut-off in minutes before the booking start time.
Cancellations after this point are considered late and may incur a fee.

options.name: --max-booking-length
options.description:
Maximum allowed duration for a single booking, in
minutes.

options.name: --members
options.description:
IDs of specific members this rule applies to. When
set, the rule only fires for these individual members.

options.name: --min-booking-length
options.description:
Minimum allowed duration for a single booking, in
minutes.

options.name: --no-return-policy
options.description:
Cooldown in minutes: prevents the same user from
booking this specific resource again within this window after their last booking
ends.

options.name: --no-return-policy-all-resources
options.description:
Cooldown in minutes: prevents the same user from
booking any resource after booking this one, for the specified window.

options.name: --no-return-policy-all-users
options.description:
Cooldown in minutes: prevents any user from
booking this resource within the specified window after the previous booking
ends.

options.name: --only-for-contacts
options.description:
When true, this rule applies only to contacts
(non-member customers).

options.name: --only-for-members
options.description:
When true, this rule applies only to active
members (coworkers with a plan).

options.name: --reject-with-message
options.description:
Message shown to the user when their booking is
rejected by this rule.

options.name: --removed-allowed-tariffs
options.description:
Allowed tariff IDs to remove (use on update to
remove without replacing).

options.name: --removed-allowed-teams
options.description:
Allowed team IDs to remove (use on update to
remove without replacing).

options.name: --removed-courses
options.description:
Course IDs to remove from the scoped list (use on
update to remove without replacing).

options.name: --removed-event-categories
options.description:
Event category IDs to remove from the scoped list
(use on update to remove without replacing).

options.name: --removed-members
options.description:
Member IDs to remove from the scoped list (use on
update to remove without replacing).

options.name: --removed-tariffs
options.description:
Tariff IDs to remove from the scoped list (use on
update to remove without replacing).

options.name: --removed-teams
options.description:
Team IDs to remove from the scoped list (use on
update to remove without replacing).

options.name: --repeat-booking-period-limit-in-months
options.description:
Maximum time span (in months) over which a
recurring booking series can extend under this rule.

options.name: --repeat-booking-quantity-limit
options.description:
Maximum number of occurrences allowed when
creating a recurring booking under this rule.

options.name: --stop-evaluation-if-rule-is-met
options.description:
When true, no further rules are evaluated after
this one matches.

options.name: --tariffs
options.description:
IDs of pricing plans this rule applies to. When
set, the rule only fires for customers on one of these plans.

options.name: --teams
options.description:
IDs of teams this rule applies to. When set, the
rule only fires for members of one of these teams.

options.name: --time-slots
options.description:
The days and times the resources can be booked
when this rule applies. The year, month and day component of FromTime/ToTime is
always 1976-01-01. (JSON array or @filepath)
